title: Building a Production-Ready FastAPI Service in 2024
description: A comprehensive walkthrough of structuring a FastAPI project for production — covering dependency injection, error handling, async patterns, database connection pooling, and deployment with Docker and Nginx.

title: Why I Switched from REST to GraphQL (and When I Switched Back)
description: An honest reflection on adopting GraphQL for a mid-size SaaS product — the wins (flexible querying, reduced overfetching) and the pain points (N+1 problems, caching complexity) that eventually brought us back to REST for certain services.

title: Understanding Kubernetes Resource Limits: A Practical Guide
description: A hands-on guide to setting CPU and memory limits in Kubernetes, understanding QoS classes, avoiding OOMKilled pods, and right-sizing workloads using Vertical Pod Autoscaler recommendations.

title: PostgreSQL Query Optimisation: 10 Patterns That Made a Difference
description: Ten concrete query and schema patterns I've used to cut P95 latency significantly in production PostgreSQL databases — covering index strategies, EXPLAIN ANALYZE interpretation, partial indexes, and JSONB optimisation.

title: The Case for Boring Technology in Your Next Side Project
description: After chasing the shiny new framework on every side project and shipping nothing, I tried building with the most boring, proven stack I knew — and finally launched. Here's what I learned about the relationship between novelty and execution.
